summary: This release enhances citation quality and reliability while restoring temporal filters and stabilizing follow-up suggestion chips.

entries.title: Scope notices for fallback search results
entries.description: Users are now explicitly notified when a product- or date-filtered query returns zero results and falls back to a broader search.

entries.title: Restored date-scoped search filters
entries.description: Queries specifying timeframes, such as 'last 6 months', now correctly filter results by publication date rather than returning the entire unfiltered document library.

entries.title: Cleaner citation previews in side panel
entries.description: Citation excerpts now display actual document content and instructions instead of cluttered structural headers and topic paths.

entries.title: Consolidated citations for multiple product versions
entries.description: The citation panel now collapses duplicate entries of the same documentation topic across different software versions, automatically showing only the most recent version to reduce clutter.

entries.title: Scrollable citation panel for large source lists
entries.description: Resolved an issue where the citation panel became cut off and unscrollable on smaller screens when displaying more than six source documents.

entries.title: Consistent follow-up suggestion chips
entries.description: Follow-up question suggestion chips no longer disappear during rapid, back-to-back queries, as the application now automatically retries failed background requests.

entries.title: High initial response generation latency
entries.description: Responses currently take up to 28 seconds to complete; streaming text generation is planned as a future update to improve perceived performance.

entries.title: Version filtering unavailable for Cortex XSIAM
entries.description: Queries targeting specific Cortex XSIAM versions will fallback to broader XSIAM documentation due to calendar-based indexing, accompanied by an explanatory scope notice.

entries.title: Limited coverage for Cortex AgentiX documentation
entries.description: Because the Cortex AgentiX platform is new, some specific queries may yield general XSOAR-based documentation where dedicated AgentiX resources are still being populated.
